reviews.comment:
Buena atención. Baños limpios pero el domingo pasado fui a comer pedí milanesas con fritas y la carne está superrrrrrr Cruda!!!! Y las papas reeee saladassss

(Translated by Google)
Good service. Clean bathrooms, but last Sunday I went to eat and ordered breaded cutlets with fries, and the meat was super raw! And the fries were really salty!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16090706033176576823/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNXzZTVFpREAE

reviews.comment:
Paro siempre a almorzar. Excelentes precios. No tienen variedad de comidas. Las chicas te atienden muy bien, mucha cordialidad.

(Translated by Google)
I always stop for lunch. Excellent prices. They don't have a wide variety of food. The staff are very friendly and helpful.

reviews.comment:
Sólo la estación de sercicio por.le.combustible. No intente comprar nada en el bar-mercado x q los precios son inalcanzables. Ni pedir agua para el termo x q tendrá que dejar un riñón.

(Translated by Google)
Only the gas station for fuel. Don't try to buy anything at the snack bar/market because the prices are unbelievable. Don't even ask for water for the thermos because you'll have to spend a fortune.
